latest.title: #656 - Fahim Anwar
latest.desc:
Fahim Anwar is a stand-up comedian and actor. His new special “Intrusive Thoughts” is out now on YouTube.

Fahim joins Theo to talk about the power of dance, an adventurous weekend they had in Clearlake, Iowa, and what can be done about America’s gooning epidemic. 

Fahim Anwar: https://www.instagram.com/fahimanwar/ 

Fahim’s new special “Intrusive Thoughts”: https://youtu.be/46cxhMQYH74

latest.title: Essentials: Control Sugar Cravings & Metabolism with Science-Based Tools
latest.desc: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, I explain how the body senses and uses sugar, and why understanding those mechanisms can help reduce sugar cravings. I discuss different types of sugar and how they are processed by pathways in the gut and the brain to shape appetite and the desire for specific foods.
